network_summary: All four locations are NPPES-registered under 'Dental Professionals of Illinois, P.C.' — the well-documented Illinois friendly-PC wrapper used by Heartland Dental LLC to comply with Illinois corporate-practice-of-dentistry law. Each office operates under a local consumer trade name (Advanced Dentistry / Essington Family Dental Care / Hickory Creek Family Dentistry / Family Dental of Orland Park), all members of the Orahh Care Dental Community, a brand owned by Heartland Dental LLC. The offices' own websites confirm the Heartland/Orahh Care affiliation and cite 'Dental Professionals of Illinois, P.C.' in their legal footers. Lindsay Bearden appears as the NPPES Authorized Official for this PC wrapper across these four watched-IL GP locations — a corporate-officer / credentialing-admin role for the friendly PC, not a dentist-owner. Heartland Dental LLC is PE-backed (KKR, as of 2018).
owner_operator_identity: Lindsay Bearden — NPPES Authorized Official for Dental Professionals of Illinois, P.C. (Heartland Dental's Illinois friendly-PC); corporate/admin role, not an owner-dentist. Heartland Dental LLC is the DSO platform (PE-backed: KKR).
brand_trade_names: Family Dental of Orland Park (Orland Park)
legal_entities: Dental Professionals of Illinois, P.C. (EIN 363354854 on Schaumburg NPI)
durable_artifacts: Shared NPPES authorized official LINDSAY BEARDEN across 4 watched-IL GP locations in ZIPs 60193/60435/60451/60467
Shared legal entity name 'DENTAL PROFESSIONALS OF ILLINOIS, P.C.' (and variant 'P.C') across all 4 NPIs

mso_platform_pe_evidence: Heartland Dental LLC is the MSO/DSO platform providing non-clinical administrative support to all four practices under the Orahh Care Dental Community brand. Source: each practice website (e.g. https://advanceddentistryschaumburg.com/, https://hickorycreekfamilydentistry.com/, https://familydentalorlandpark.com/, https://essingtondental.com/) carries the disclosure 'Orahh Care Dental Community is a brand owned by Heartland Dental LLC, which is a dental support organization that provides administrative and business support services to the dental practices.' Heartland Dental is KKR-backed (PE sponsor, 2018). Official DSO site: https://heartland.com/.
stale_closed_false_positive_notes: Joliet NPI 1528271889 at '692 Essington Rd' may reflect an older/original Heartland Dental Care LLC address (confirmed by Manta: Heartland Dental Care LLC at 692 Essington Rd Unit A, Joliet). The current Essington Family Dental Care website shows '1240 Essington Rd, Ste 200' — a possible relocation. The NPPES record at 692 Essington Rd remains active and is legitimately a Heartland/Dental Professionals of Illinois location. Flag for address-currency check in next NPPES cycle. This is NOT a false positive — both addresses are Heartland-operated.
evidence_chain: AO signal: LINDSAY BEARDEN appears as NPPES Authorized Official across 4 IL GP locations (reach=4, ZIPs 60193/60435/60451/60467), all registered as 'DENTAL PROFESSIONALS OF ILLINOIS, P.C.' with entity_classification=dso_national and affiliated_dso=Heartland Dental. Documentary corroboration: (1) advanceddentistryschaumburg.com (140 S Roselle Rd, Schaumburg) footer confirms 'Dental Professionals of Illinois, P.C.' and Orahh Care/Heartland Dental LLC MSO relationship; (2) hickorycreekfamilydentistry.com (561 E Lincoln Hwy, New Lenox) same footer + same Heartland disclosure; (3) familydentalorlandpark.com (11041 W 179th St, Orland Park) same; (4) essingtondental.com (Essington Rd, Joliet) footer '©2026 Essington Family Dental Care, Dental Professionals of Illinois, P.C.' + same Heartland disclosure. All four are Orahh Care Dental Community member practices, an umbrella brand of Heartland Dental LLC. This is a confirmed Heartland Dental branded_dso network; Lindsay Bearden is the corporate AO for the friendly-PC shell, not an independent dentist-owner.
future_app_notes: Heartland Dental's Illinois friendly-PC 'Dental Professionals of Illinois, P.C.' likely covers many more IL locations beyond these 4 watched ZIPs — consider querying all NPPES NPIs with this org name in watched ZIPs to ensure full coverage. Orahh Care Dental Community is a Heartland consumer-brand alias — any new locations under that brand should be classified dso_national. PE sponsor: KKR (2018 investment). Lindsay Bearden is an AO/credentialing contact for the PC, not an owner — her name appearing on additional NPIs is a reliable signal of more Heartland locations. Joliet address at 692 Essington Rd should be verified in next NPPES release for currency (possible relocation to 1240 Essington Rd).
